title: Gabi ng lagim: The Movie
original_title: KMJS' Gabi Ng Lagim: The Movie
overview: Three chilling tales based on real stories expose the haunting depths of faith, fear, and the unknown — from a seafarer trapped on a cursed voyage, to an island plagued by a flesh-eating legend, and a young woman's battle against a legion of demons that pushes the limits of faith and sanity.
